raw_consumer_statement:
Multiple times my Best Buy credit card has been hacked. 

1st card - NEVER ACTIVATED - I had 6 fraudulent charges back in XXXX ( XXXX on XX/XX/year> at XXXX store and 4 duplicate charges XX/XX/year> at XXXX store ). I am still in the process of disputing those charges awaiting a final decision. 
Card was canceled, duplicate card issued. 

XXXX card - Today, XX/XX/year> I had XXXX duplicate charges at XXXX XXXX location. New card and again someone stole account number. 

Neither card was ever taken out of the house. Cards were NOT stolen. Card numbers have been used somehow. Best Buy insider stealing number???
